task_description: Look up the current weather for a city via an MCP weather server and produce a 2-3 sentence summary.

steps.title: summarise_forecast
steps.aim: Render a friendly 2-3 sentence forecast summary, mentioning the temperature, conditions, and any notable weather alerts.
steps.reasoning_questions: What temperature range will today see? What conditions should the user prepare for? Is there a noteworthy alert?
steps.stage_action: Write the summary as plain English sentences. Avoid technical jargon. Keep it under 60 words.
steps.example_reasoning: Pull the high/low + condition string out of forecast_raw; mention any 'alerts' field present.
